after: Prompts and input data pin repo/base/target branch; overlay prep failures become structured validation results and temp dirs are cleaned.
before: Report-only QA inferred target from its own branch and overlay preparation exceptions escaped as unstructured failures.
summary: 当审查/QA 委派在独立分支运行时，始终固定真实目标分支，并使本地验证设置失败结构化且可审计。
